name: roubo-plugins
description: Source for the Roubo integration and component plugins, built against the published @roubo SDK packages.
author: David Poxon

scripts.build: npm run build -w @roubo/shared-github && npm run build -w @roubo/plugin-github-com && npm run build -w @roubo/plugin-ghe && npm run build -w @roubo/plugin-jira-self-hosted && npm run build -w @roubo/plugin-process && npm run build -w @roubo/plugin-database
